name: Chocaholics Revenge
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 23 cm cake tin generously.
2. Chop the butter and chocolate and combine with the sugar, vanilla essence, water, and coffee in a double saucepan or heatproof bowl. Stir over hot water until everything has melted.
3. Allow the mixture to cool until it is lukewarm.
4. Transfer the mixture to a large bowl. Sift in the plain flour and self-raising flour, then add the cocoa. Mix in the eggs.
5. Pour the batter into the greased pan and bake in a moderately slow oven (150°C is ideal) for about 1.25 to 1.5 hours.
6. Allow the cake to stand for 10 minutes before turning it onto a serving tray.
7. Serve the cake hot or cold.
